payload.name: Database Reactivation Workflow
payload.description:
Build an automated Database Reactivation Workflow — a Python-based system that identifies dormant customers in a database, generates personalized AI-driven messages via Claude API, and sends reactivation offers via email (with optional Instagram DM). 

Two modes required:
1. Demo mode (`--demo`): uses sample data, prints to console/saves to local file, no real API calls
2. Production mode: connects to Google Sheets, sends real emails via Resend API, logs to Google Sheets SYSTEM_LOG

Key requirements:
- Tech stack: Python, Google Sheets (gspread), Anthropic Claude API, Resend API, schedule/cron
- Filter logic: churn_score > 0.7 AND (campaign_date empty OR > 30 days ago) AND days_since_last_contact > 90
- Three offer types based on churn score: informational (0.7-0.8), bonus_points (0.8-0.9), discount (0.9-1.0)
- Business type aware (gym / dental clinic / coaching) for tone personalization
- Sample demo data for all three business types (2-3 each)
- Proper logging to SYSTEM_LOG with timestamps
- Daily scheduling at 9 AM
- Demo and production modes via CLI argument

Research topics to cover first:
1. Similar Python-based customer reactivation workflows patterns and architectures
2. Best practices for AI-generated personalized reactivation emails (convert vs spam)
3. Churn scoring thresholds (are 0.7/0.8/0.9 cutoffs industry standard?)
4. Email deliverability best practices in Python (Resend vs Gmail API vs SMTP)
5. Existing open-source reactivation workflow projects for reference

After research, deliver 20-30 clarification questions covering demo mode output format, client delivery mechanism, email language, business type handling, AI JSON validation, duplicate handling, client setup requirements, pricing/packaging, compliance/spam law concerns.
